title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 05.03.2024
summary:
Main
As spot price records fall one after another, sentiment in dry bulk is reaching new highs - With February average Capesize rates reaching more than 21,000
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Bi-Weekly Report
• As spot price records fall one after another, sentiment in dry bulk is reaching new highs - With February average
Capesize rates reaching more than 21,000, market participants remain extremely bullish for the progression of the
year. And rightly so: if the weakest month of the year managed to average such a strong level, the rest of the year
